access.title: Dashboard Access
access.description: Manage who can sign in to the admin console and what each role can reach
access.empty: No staff members match your filters.
access.pending_note: Role changes apply once the staff_role column ships in blink-server.

matrix.title: Permission matrix
matrix.desc: Every section, and which roles can reach it — mirrors what's enforced.

create.title: Add staff member
create.desc: Create a console account and assign a dashboard role.
create.required: First name, email and phone are required.

grant.title: Invite an existing user
grant.desc: Give an existing Blink user an admin role by their account email.

revoke.title: Revoke access
revoke.desc: Remove all dashboard access for {name}? They will no longer be able to sign in to the console.

super_admin.name: Super Admin
super_admin.desc: Unrestricted — every section, plus user and access management.

ops_admin.name: Ops Admin
ops_admin.desc: Day-to-day operations: orders, trips, riders and verification.

finance_admin.name: Finance Admin
finance_admin.desc: Blink Cash — ledger, dues and agent float.

commerce_admin.name: Commerce Admin
commerce_admin.desc: Marketplace, agent shops, promotions and coupons.
